title: 9 Signs a Godly Man Actually Runs His Life
caption:
9 signs a godly man actually runs his life. Not the other way around.

Self-mastery is the foundation of his character. A man who can govern himself can be trusted with everything else. A man who can't is a city with no walls.

Save this one for the week your discipline feels loud and your excuses feel louder.

#faith #selfcontrol #discipline #christianman #manofgod
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
